name: Performapal Whim Witch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィム・ウィッチ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If your opponent controls a face-up monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck and you do not: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Whim Witch" once per turn.

[ Monster Effect ] 
This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Pendulum Monster.
pend_eff: If your opponent controls a face-up monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck and you do not: You can Special Summon this card from your Pendulum Zone. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Whim Witch" once per turn.
mnst_eff: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Pendulum Monster.
eff: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a Pendulum Monster.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Pendulum Zone
